title: elsholtzia cristata var. saxatilis
intro: Elsholtzia cristata var. saxatilis, also known as Rock Vietnamese mint or Rock mountain silver leaf, is a type of herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to China. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Vietnamese cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Elsholtzia cristata var. saxatilis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and aiding in digestion. Elsholtzia cristata var. saxatilis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
